label: Manage areas from a location, with proper permissions
items: Add a new area (bed, border, pot) to a location right from its page — the Add-Area wizard is built in, no more “go to settings” dead-end.
Editing an area, adding areas, changing indoor/outdoor, and deleting are now correctly permission-controlled: viewers can look, members can add and edit, and only owners/admins can delete.
The same rules now apply everywhere you manage a garden — the home grid, a location's page, and inside an area.
